findings.evidence: The PDF tables on this page use green, red, and grey background colors for specific cells to visually indicate data ranges (heatmap styling). The HTML conversion removes these background colors entirely, although the structural data remains intact.

findings.description: Extraneous text artifact from image extraction
findings.evidence: A stray character 'A' appears as a distinct paragraph below the figure caption in the HTML. This text is not part of the document body in the PDF and appears to be erroneously extracted from image labels.

findings.description: Extraneous text artifacts from image extraction
findings.evidence: The text strings '2021' and 'A' appear as separate paragraphs at the bottom of the HTML page. These are labels embedded within the figure in the PDF and should not be extracted into the main text flow.

findings.description: Extraneous text artifact from image extraction
findings.evidence: A stray character 'A' appears as a distinct paragraph below the figure caption in the HTML. This text is not present in the PDF body.

findings.description: Significant formatting artifacts and duplicated content
findings.evidence: Below the main figure and its caption, the HTML erroneously includes a solid black rectangular block, a duplicate of the figure caption, and the stray text '2020'. None of these elements exist in the body text of the original PDF.
